name: ddd-dap
description: Loom DAP (Debug Adapter Protocol) stdio server — wires the pure DAP resolution cores (src/dap/) over a generated .loom/sourcemap.json so an editor can set breakpoints / see stack frames in .ddd source. Ships the REMAP LAYER only: initialize/setBreakpoints/stackTrace handlers over the two shipped cores. The full delegating target-debugger proxy (spawning js-debug/coreclr/JDWP for launch/attach) is the remaining editor-verified frontier — see docs/proposals/source-map-and-debugging.md §6E.
